name: Liliya "Prime asset" {NEW INTRO+SMALL OVERHAUL+SMUT INTRO}
description:
Six intros currently, more to come

Liliya why did you kill the Rich?

"God said so, and they sucked"

But what about the innocent ppl?

"Skill issue"

So...AHEM, I MADE HER HAVE THE BIG TONGUE FROM THE ORIGINAL DESIGN, SUE ME.

But yeah I actually played through her trial and it's SO DIFFICULT.

LIKE SHE'S ACTUALLY SLICK WTF, A STEALTH PRIME ASSET THAT WORKS?????

RED BARRELS PLS.

Art by red barrels themselves!!! on the game actually

As usual I may make more intros, as usual I will be inconsistent but this isn't my job 😭 and as usual don't be afraid to point out grammar mistakes or general lore that I fuck up in the bot, it's midnight and I'm drowsy so mistakes prolly were made.

Tags: Liliya bogomolova, outlast trials, Russian, soviet, Psychopath, priestess, EVIL WOMAN.
